requirement_topic.en: 50 Hz Grid Frequency and Uzbekistan Parameter Settings
requirement_topic.zh: 50Hz电网频率与乌兹别克斯坦参数设置
requirement_topic.zht: 50Hz電網頻率與烏茲別克斯坦參數設定

summary.en: Uzbekistan's national power system operates on a nominal 220/380 V, 50 Hz frequency (CIS legacy, same nominal voltage class as China). PV inverter firmware, protection thresholds, ride-through settings, frequency-watt behavior, reconnection timing, and commissioning records should be configured to the Uzbekistan project and the relevant grid-operator's technical conditions (National Electric Grid of Uzbekistan / regional energy companies) rather than left at China factory defaults.
summary.zh: 乌兹别克斯坦国家电力系统采用220/380V、50Hz额定电压（独联体传统，与中国额定电压等级相同）。光伏逆变器固件、保护阈值、穿越设置、频率-有功行为、重连时间和调试记录应按乌兹别克斯坦项目及相关电网运营商（乌兹别克斯坦国家电网/区域能源公司）的技术条件进行配置，而不应保留中国出厂默认值。
summary.zht: 烏茲別克斯坦國家電力系統採用220/380V、50Hz額定電壓（獨聯體傳統，與中國額定電壓等級相同）。光伏逆變器韌體、保護閾值、穿越設定、頻率-有功行為、重連時間和調試記錄應按烏茲別克斯坦項目及相關電網運營商（烏茲別克斯坦國家電網/區域能源公司）的技術條件進行配置，而不應保留中國出廠預設值。

standards_or_laws: Uzbekistan national power-system nominal: 220/380 V, 50 Hz
National Electric Grid of Uzbekistan / regional energy company technical conditions for project-specific protection and frequency settings
O'z DSt / GOST grid-protection standards where applicable

summary.en: China also uses 220/380 V, 50 Hz, so the nominal voltage and frequency label aligns. The difference is in protection bands, ride-through curves, active-power frequency response, reconnection logic, and operator-specific commissioning evidence under GB/T 19964-2024 and GB/T 37408-2021 versus Uzbekistan network-operator requirements.
summary.zh: 中国同样使用220/380V、50Hz，因此额定电压和频率标称值一致。差异在于GB/T 19964-2024和GB/T 37408-2021下的保护区间、穿越曲线、有功频率响应、重连逻辑和运营商专项调试证据与乌兹别克斯坦电网运营商要求不同。
summary.zht: 中國同樣使用220/380V、50Hz，因此額定電壓和頻率標稱值一致。差異在於GB/T 19964-2024和GB/T 37408-2021下的保護區間、穿越曲線、有功頻率響應、重連邏輯和運營商專項調試證據與烏茲別克斯坦電網運營商要求不同。

gap.en: The voltage and frequency labels align, but grid-code settings may not. Exporters should provide Uzbekistan-specific parameter profiles, locked settings evidence where required, commissioning screenshots or logs, and a method for verifying settings after firmware updates. Internationally-financed projects may additionally require IEC 62116 anti-islanding test evidence regardless of local minimums.
gap.zh: 电压和频率标称值一致，但并网参数未必一致。出口商应提供乌兹别克斯坦专用参数配置文件、必要时的锁定设置证据、调试截图或日志，以及固件更新后验证设置的方法。国际融资项目还可能额外要求IEC 62116防孤岛测试证据，不论当地最低要求。
gap.zht: 電壓和頻率標稱值一致，但併網參數未必一致。出口商應提供烏茲別克斯坦專用參數配置文件、必要時的鎖定設定證據、調試截圖或日誌，以及韌體更新後驗證設定的方法。國際融資項目還可能額外要求IEC 62116防孤島測試證據，不論當地最低要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid connection and commissioning according to the relevant Uzbekistan network operator's technical conditions
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic China grid connection but parameter sets are not automatically portable to Uzbekistan

source.publisher: Ministry of Energy of the Republic of Uzbekistan

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] China and Uzbekistan both use 220/380 V, 50 Hz, but Uzbekistan grid-connection acceptance still requires local protection and operating-parameter confirmation with the relevant network operator.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国和乌兹别克斯坦均使用220/380V、50Hz，但乌兹别克斯坦并网验收仍需与相关电网运营商确认当地保护和运行参数。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國和烏茲別克斯坦均使用220/380V、50Hz，但烏茲別克斯坦併網驗收仍需與相關電網運營商確認當地保護和運行參數。
